action.text: SA 5826 fell when SA 5825 (the instructions of the motion to refer) fell.
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Amendment SA 5826 proposed by Senator Thune to Amendment SA 5825 (the instructions of the motion to refer).
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5826 proposed by Senator Thune to Amendment SA 5825 (the instructions of the motion to refer).
